origin.capability_match: Initiate remote token transfers via TokenRouter (Doc 21)

attack_surface.data_description: Call to 'transferRemote' on SyntheticTokenRouter, attempting to burn a specified amount of tokens.

security_gap.gap_description: Transaction may revert if user attempts to burn more synthetic tokens than they own.

actor_risk.description: User error in specifying amount or insufficient balance.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Causes transaction revert and wasted gas for the user.

assumptions: User attempts to transfer (and thus burn) an amount of synthetic tokens exceeding their current balance.
The SyntheticTokenRouter's burn function correctly checks balances and reverts on underflow.

mitigation.strategy: Frontend UI should check and display user balance before allowing transfer. Contract should have clear revert messages.

description: User attempts to transfer (and burn) an amount of synthetic tokens via the SyntheticTokenRouter that is greater than their balance, causing the transaction to revert and waste gas.

trace_source.matched_capability: Initiate remote token transfers via TokenRouter (Doc 21)
